results.title: Two Arkansas rescue teams deployed in response to Texas floods
results.description: Two Arkansas swift water search and rescue teams will head to Texas to assist communities experiencing severe and widespread flooding, the Arkansas Division of Emergency Management said Friday.

results.title: Fixing Malta's parole system will take political courage
results.description: The prison system in Malta is under constant pressure and cannot provide the quality of rehabilitative services to be expected from a modern correctional environment. File photo: Matthew Mirabelli

results.title: Russian forces strike Zaporizhzhia Oblast more than 800 times, killing one person
results.description: Russian forces conducted 851 attacks across Zaporizhzhia Oblast in 24 hours, killing one person, injuring two, and damaging houses and infrastructure.

results.title: How cops in civil clothes formed human chain, used bedsheets to remove Sonam Wangchuk from Jantar Mantar
results.description: Delhi Police ended activist Sonam Wangchuk’s 20-day hunger strike at Jantar Mantar in a swift early morning operation. Plainclothes and uniformed officers formed a human chain, used white bedsheets to shield the activist from public view, and shifted him to Safdarjung Hospital, citing Delhi High Court directions and medical advice.

results.title: Lionel Messi Hails Lamine Yamal Ahead of FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
results.description: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 final approaches, Argentina's captain Lionel Messi has praised Spain's young star Lamine Yamal, calling him an 'amazing' player. Messi expressed Argentina's intent to prevent Yamal from achieving a historic milestone. Argentina secured their place in the final after a thrilling comeback against England, while Spain reached the final for the first time since 2010 by defeating France. This article explores both teams' journeys to the final and the significance of Yamal's performance.

results.title: Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal: From Childhood Photo to World Cup Final Showdown
results.description: The journey of Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal from a childhood photo to the FIFA World Cup 2026 final is nothing short of remarkable. Messi, reflecting on their iconic image taken nearly 18 years ago, expressed his astonishment at how it has gained significance as they prepare to face each other on football's biggest stage. UNICEF has highlighted their shared mission as Goodwill Ambassadors, advocating for children's rights worldwide. As Argentina and Spain gear up for a thrilling final, Messi leads the Golden Boot race, setting the stage for an unforgettable clash between the two football stars.

results.title: Tech selloff weighs on European shares ahead of ECB meeting next week
results.description: European stocks edged lower Friday, influenced by a global tech sell-off and Middle East tensions. Investors await the European Central Bank meeting and corporate earnings reports next week. Rising oil prices and subdued reactions to strong results complicated the market backdrop. Tech stocks experienced a significant decline this week, impacting major AI beneficiaries. Utilities and defense sectors saw gains, while luxury brands faced headwinds from reduced tourist spending.

results.title: Johor exco line-up unveiled with four new faces
results.description: JOHOR BARU: Four new faces have been appointed to the Johor state executive council (Exco), while six existing members have been retained.

results.title: Business News | Emergent Raises Series C at $1.5 Billion Valuation, Becomes Unicorn in a Year of Launch
results.description: Get latest articles and stories on Business at LatestLY. San Francisco (California) [US] / Bengaluru (Karnataka) [India], July 18: Emergent, the fast-growing AI software creation platform that enables founders and business owners to build full-stack, production-ready web and mobile applications, today announced a $130 million Series C funding. The round was led by Creaegis, with MNI Ventures - Claypond Capital and Sentinel Global as co-lead investors, and participation from Khosla Ventures, SoftBank Vision Fund 2, Lightspeed, and Y Combinator.

results.title: Azeri Light crude rises to $91.5 per barrel
results.description: The price of Azerbaijan's Azeri LT CIF oil in the world market increased by $2.68, or 3.02%, to $91.5 per barrel, Report informs.

results.title: Tension prevails as police and revenue departments evict farmers at Shamshabad
results.description: Tension prevailed in Bahadurguda village of Shamshabad as HYDRAA and Revenue Department officials began taking over 650 acres of land amid heavy police deployment. Farmers protested the move, while the BRS extended support and alleged police prevented its leaders from reaching the village.

results.title: Man dead after bridge traffic chaos
results.description: A driver has died after a major crash on the Sydney Harbour Bridge triggered hours of traffic chaos on Saturday.
